title: Principal AI Developer - Finance Automation & Enterprise Integration
company_focus: End-to-end health science solutions and diagnostics
description:
Job TitlePrincipal AI Developer - Finance Automation &
Enterprise Integration Location(s)India - Remote

About Us

Revvity is a developer and provider of end-to-end solutions
designed to help scientists, researchers, and clinicians
solve the world’s greatest health challenges. We pair the
enthusiasm of an industry disruptor with the experience of a
longtime leader. Our team of 11,000+ colleagues from around
the globe are vital to our success and the reason we’re able
to push boundaries in pursuit of better human health.

Find your future at Revvity

Principal AI Developer - Finance Automation & Enterprise
Integration (India)

About You:

You're a seasoned AI professional with deep expertise in
artificial intelligence and enterprise system integration,
passionate about how generative AI and large language models
(LLMs) can transform financial operations at scale. You
embody our core values:

Embrace the unknown: You lead with a "What if?" mindset,
architecting innovative AI solutions that revolutionize
traditional finance processes and enterprise workflows
across global operations.

Partner with purpose: You're excited to mentor teams,
collaborate with global stakeholders, and use AI to drive
measurable business outcomes across finance, operations, and
technology departments.

Passion for people: You understand that AI's true potential
lies in empowering finance professionals, analysts, and
business users to make faster, more informed decisions while
maintaining human oversight.

Collaborate for success: You excel in leading cross-
functional initiatives, building consensus across time
zones, and fostering a culture of transparency and integrity
when handling sensitive financial data.

You're a proven technical leader, comfortable with complex
enterprise architectures, and excited by the challenge of
scaling cutting-edge AI technologies across global business
operations.

What You'll Do:

Within 30 Days

- Lead technical assessment of current AI automation
  infrastructure and identify optimization opportunities

- Establish relationships with global finance leadership, IT
  architecture teams, and regional stakeholders

- Conduct deep-dive analysis of existing SAP, Salesforce, and
  cloud platform integrations to identify AI enhancement
  opportunities

- Mentor junior developers and establish technical standards
  for the India AI development team

- Present strategic roadmap for AI-driven financial automation
  to senior leadership

Within 60 Days

- Architect and lead development of enterprise-scale AI
  solutions for financial process automation (P2P, O2C, R2R
  cycles)

- Design and implement advanced prompt engineering frameworks
  for complex financial document processing and analysis

- Lead integration projects connecting AI models with SAP
  S/4HANA, Salesforce Financial Services Cloud, and multi-
  cloud environments

- Establish CI/CD pipelines for AI model deployment with
  enterprise-grade security, compliance, and monitoring

- Drive technical decision-making for cloud infrastructure
  scaling across AWS/Azure/GCP platforms

- Collaborate with global teams to ensure 24/7 system
  reliability and performance optimization

Within 90 Days

- Own end-to-end delivery of mission-critical AI automation
  platforms serving global finance operations

- Lead technical presentations to C-suite executives,
  translating AI capabilities into strategic business value

- Establish center of excellence for AI development practices,
  including code review standards, testing frameworks, and
  deployment protocols

- Drive innovation in real-time financial analytics,
  predictive modeling, and intelligent reporting systems

- Mentor and scale the India AI development team, establishing
  career development pathways

- Lead vendor evaluations and technology partnerships for
  next-generation AI capabilities

- Ensure compliance with global data governance, financial
  regulations, and security standards

Requirements:

Technical Leadership:

- 12+ years of overall IT experience

- 5+ years of enterprise AI/ML development experience with
  proven track record of scaling production systems

- Experience with Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as GitHub
  Actions, or AWS CodePipeline

- Expert-level proficiency in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript,
  cloud-native architectures, and containerization (Docker,
  Kubernetes)

- Deep experience with LLM integration, prompt engineering,
  and AI model optimization for enterprise applications

- Proven expertise in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) with
  focus on AI/ML services and enterprise integration
  patterns

- Strong background in API development, microservices
  architecture, and enterprise system integrations

Enterprise & Finance Domain:

- Extensive experience with SAP modules (FI/CO, S/4HANA, BTP)
  and/or Salesforce platform development

- Deep understanding of financial processes: accounts
  payable/receivable, financial reporting, budgeting,
  forecasting

- Experience with enterprise data governance, financial
  compliance (SOX, GAAP, IFRS), and audit requirements

- Knowledge of real-time data processing, ETL pipelines, and
  financial data warehousing

Leadership & Communication:

- Proven ability to lead technical teams and mentor junior
  developers

- Experience presenting to senior executives and translating
  technical concepts to business stakeholders

- Strong project management skills with experience in
  Agile/Scrum methodologies

- Excellent English communication skills for global
  collaboration across time zones

Bonus Qualifications:

- Experience with Indian financial regulations and compliance
  requirements

- Background in fintech, banking, or life sciences industry

- Certifications in cloud platforms ((AWS Solutions Architect,
  Azure AI Engineer, etc.)

- Experience with MLOps, model governance, and AI ethics
  frameworks

- Knowledge of emerging AI technologies (RAG, fine-tuning,
  multi-modal AI)
responsibilities: Architect and lead development of enterprise-scale AI solutions for financial process automation (P2P, O2C, R2R cycles)
Design and implement advanced prompt engineering frameworks for complex financial document processing and analysis
Lead integration projects connecting AI models with SAP S/4HANA, Salesforce Financial Services Cloud, and multi-cloud environments
Establish CI/CD pipelines for AI model deployment with enterprise-grade security, compliance, and monitoring
Drive technical decision-making for cloud infrastructure scaling across AWS/Azure/GCP platforms
Mentor junior developers and establish technical standards for the India AI development team
Lead vendor evaluations and technology partnerships for next-generation AI capabilities
Ensure compliance with global data governance, financial regulations, and security standards
use_cases: Financial process automation including procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, and record-to-report cycles
Complex financial document processing and analysis
Real-time financial analytics and predictive modeling
Enterprise workflow automation across finance and operations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying AI
solutions including LLM integration, prompt engineering, and
AI model optimization for enterprise applications. The
developer will architect and implement AI systems for
financial automation, establishing MLOps pipelines and
working hands-on with RAG and fine-tuning techniques.
